title: Pixie 16x
body:
**Pixie** changes textures to be more like PvP related.

Head over to the **Gallery** section to see more images of this pack!

# Features
- **16x Textures**: This pack brings Minecraft textures!
- **PvP Textures**: PvP themed textures!
- **Colorful Texture**: More life to the game!

# Installation
**Pixie** is now only compatible with Minecraft 1.8.9 and can be installed through the Modrinth app, or manually added to your resource pack folder.

**Highly Recommended:** [**Optifine**](https://optifine.net/home) or [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) installled.
